'''nahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:justifyingly|justifyingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:justifyingly|justifyingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nahate|nahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nahatesher|nahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahatesherĂ«m|nahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nahatero|nahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nahateshĂ«|nahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahateshĂ«m|nahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinahatero|gokinahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinahateshĂ«|gokinahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahateshĂ«m|gokinahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonahankerom|gonahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonahankeshĂ«|gonahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonahankeshĂ«m|gonahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonahankeya|gonahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nahaterom|nahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahatemu|nahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nahateya|nahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinahaterom|gokinahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahatemu|gokinahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinahateya|gokinahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nahahate|nahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nahahatesher|nahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahahatesherĂ«m|nahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nahahatero|nahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nahahateshĂ«|nahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahahateshĂ«m|nahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinahahatero|gokinahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinahahateshĂ«|gokinahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahahateshĂ«m|gokinahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonahahankerom|gonahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonahahankeshĂ«|gonahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonahahankeshĂ«m|gonahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonahahankeya|gonahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nahahaterom|nahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahahatemu|nahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nahahateya|nahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinahahaterom|gokinahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahahatemu|gokinahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinahahateya|gokinahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠte|nĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠtesher|nĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠtero|nĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠhĂŠtero|gokinĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠterom|nĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠtemu|nĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠteya|nĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠhĂŠterom|gokinĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠhĂŠteya|gokinĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafhafte|nafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafhaftesher|nafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafhaftesherĂ«m|nafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafhaftero|nafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafhafteshĂ«|nafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafhafteshĂ«m|nafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafhaftero|gokinafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafhafteshĂ«|gokinafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafhafteshĂ«m|gokinafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafhafnkerom|gonafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafhafnkeshĂ«|gonafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafhafnkeshĂ«m|gonafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafhafnkeya|gonafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafhafterom|nafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafhaftemu|nafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafhafteya|nafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafhafterom|gokinafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafhaftemu|gokinafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafhafteya|gokinafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
